notes.label: github_doc
notes.output: 3:description: "Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced queries."

notes.label: ontology_create_node
notes.command: cd runtime_scripts/ontology && python3 ontology.py create --type Project --props '{"name":"Q1技能体验","status":"active"}' | head -n 40

notes.label: ontology_query
notes.command: cd runtime_scripts/ontology && python3 ontology.py query --type Project --where '{"status":"active"}' | head -n 80
